2026-04-18T09:21:57.3709901Z ##[group]Run actions/github-script@373c709c69115d41ff229c7e5df9f8788daa9553
2026-04-18T09:21:57.3711453Z with:
2026-04-18T09:21:57.3720693Z   script: const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
  core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
  return;
}

const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };

const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
  await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
  core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
}

await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
  ...repo,
  workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
  ref: 'main',
  inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
});
core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);

2026-04-18T09:21:57.3730405Z   github-token: ***
2026-04-18T09:21:57.3731005Z   debug: false
2026-04-18T09:21:57.3731538Z   user-agent: actions/github-script
2026-04-18T09:21:57.3732268Z   result-encoding: json
2026-04-18T09:21:57.3732827Z   retries: 0
